overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket exploring a foggy graveyard and rural path. The character encounters a mysterious woman among tombstones, approaches a stone chapel, and continues through a metal gate into a forested area with power lines and stone walls.

events.description: mysterious woman in white top and red skirt appears standing among tombstones
woman disappears from view as character continues walking past dead tree

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the foggy graveyard, observing the tombstones and surroundings

notable_agents.action: standing still among tombstones watching the protagonist approach

entered.detail: leafless twisted tree trunk with bare branches
weathered gray grave markers of varying sizes dotting the landscape
narrow muddy trail winding through the graveyard

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a desolate foggy graveyard with scattered tombstones and a prominent dead tree. A mysterious woman appears standing among the graves, watching silently before disappearing from view as the character continues past the twisted tree trunk.

events.description: large stone chapel with gothic archway comes into view on the left
character stops and looks upward at the chapel steeple and statue

agents.ego_description: approaching the stone chapel and pausing to look up at the architecture and steeple

entered.detail: gothic stone church with weathered facade and pointed arch doorway
tall spire with statue niche rising above the chapel roof

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an abandoned stone chapel with gothic architecture, pausing to look up at the steeple and statue before turning away. The heavy fog obscures the upper reaches of the building, creating an ominous atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy forest trail with stone walls and power lines

events.description: approaching rusted metal gate between stone pillars
character opens the metal gate and walks through

agents.ego_description: opening the metal gate and continuing along the walled path into the forested area

entered.detail: rusted iron gate with pointed finials between stone pillars
low moss-covered stone walls lining both sides of the path
wooden utility poles with wires stretching into the fog
tall evergreen trees emerging from the dense fog

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and opens a rusted metal gate, continuing along a narrow path flanked by stone walls and power lines. The environment transitions to a denser forest with tall pine trees visible through the persistent fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, foggy graveyard that gradually transitions into a dense, forested path. It begins among scattered tombstones and a twisted dead tree, where a mysterious woman appears silently before vanishing as the character moves forward. As the camera advances, the scene opens up to reveal an abandoned stone chapel with gothic architecture, its steeple and statues partially obscured by the heavy, ominous fog. The movement then leads the character toward a rusted metal gate, which opens to reveal a narrow path flanked by stone walls and power lines. Finally, the environment shifts from the open graveyard into a thick forest of tall pine trees that loom through the persistent mist.
